source_gse40279: Hannum 2013 PMID 23177740, n=656 whole blood Illumina 450k
consistency: both calibrations give β in [0.6, 1.0] range, consistent with monotonic time-dominant counter; discrepancy reflects cohort age-distribution bias
recalibrate_when: data from broader age-uniform cohort (e.g. UK Biobank, Lothian Birth Cohort) obtained
